question: Which papers report a data collection method whose name matches "survey"?
gold_sparql:
PREFIX orkgr: <http://orkg.org/orkg/resource/>
PREFIX orkgc: <http://orkg.org/orkg/class/>
PREFIX orkgp: <http://orkg.org/orkg/predicate/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?paper ?paperLabel WHERE {
  ?paper orkgp:P31 ?contribution .
  ?contribution a orkgc:C27001 .
  ?contribution orkgp:P56008 ?dc .
  ?dc orkgp:P1005 ?method .
  ?method orkgp:P145012 ?method_name .
  FILTER(REGEX(LCASE(STR(?method_name)), "survey")) .
  OPTIONAL { ?paper rdfs:label ?paperLabel . }
}
ORDER BY ?paper
LIMIT 10

question: Which papers report a research question whose text mentions "requirements"?
gold_sparql:
PREFIX orkgr: <http://orkg.org/orkg/resource/>
PREFIX orkgc: <http://orkg.org/orkg/class/>
PREFIX orkgp: <http://orkg.org/orkg/predicate/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?paper ?paperLabel WHERE {
  ?paper orkgp:P31 ?contribution .
  ?contribution a orkgc:C27001 .
  ?contribution orkgp:P37330 ?rq .
  ?rq orkgp:P44139 ?rq_text .
  FILTER(REGEX(LCASE(STR(?rq_text)), "requirements")) .
  OPTIONAL { ?paper rdfs:label ?paperLabel . }
}
ORDER BY ?paper
LIMIT 10

question: Which papers report either descriptive statistics or machine learning in their data analysis?
What is the earliest publication year among papers whose data collection method type mentions interview?
gold_sparql:
PREFIX orkgr: <http://orkg.org/orkg/resource/>
PREFIX orkgc: <http://orkg.org/orkg/class/>
PREFIX orkgp: <http://orkg.org/orkg/predicate/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT (MIN(xsd:integer(?year)) AS ?earliest_year) WHERE {
  ?paper orkgp:P31 ?contribution .
  ?contribution a orkgc:C27001 .
  ?paper orkgp:P29 ?year .
  ?contribution orkgp:P56008 ?dc .
  ?dc orkgp:P1005 ?method .
  ?method orkgp:P94003 ?method_type .
  ?method_type rdfs:label ?method_type_label .
  FILTER(REGEX(LCASE(STR(?method_type_label)), "interview")) .
}

question: What is the average publication year of papers that report a null hypothesis?
gold_sparql:
PREFIX orkgr: <http://orkg.org/orkg/resource/>
PREFIX orkgc: <http://orkg.org/orkg/class/>
PREFIX orkgp: <http://orkg.org/orkg/predicate/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT (AVG(xsd:decimal(?year)) AS ?avg_year) WHERE {
  ?paper orkgp:P31 ?contribution .
  ?contribution a orkgc:C27001 .
  ?paper orkgp:P29 ?year .
  ?contribution orkgp:P15124 ?da .
  ?da orkgp:P56043 ?inf .
  ?inf orkgp:P30001 ?hyp .
  ?hyp orkgp:P41703 ?hyp_type .
  ?hyp_type orkgp:P35106 ?null_hyp .
}

question: Which papers report a data analysis method but do not report any statistical technique?
gold_sparql:
PREFIX orkgr: <http://orkg.org/orkg/resource/>
PREFIX orkgc: <http://orkg.org/orkg/class/>
PREFIX orkgp: <http://orkg.org/orkg/predicate/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?paper ?paperLabel WHERE {
  ?paper orkgp:P31 ?contribution .
  ?contribution a orkgc:C27001 .
  ?contribution orkgp:P15124 ?da .
  ?da orkgp:P1005 ?analysis_method .
  FILTER NOT EXISTS {
    ?da orkgp:P56043 ?inf .
    ?inf orkgp:P35133 ?tech .
  }
  OPTIONAL { ?paper rdfs:label ?paperLabel . }
}
ORDER BY ?paper
LIMIT 10

question: Which papers report either mean or median in their descriptive statistics?
gold_sparql:
PREFIX orkgr: <http://orkg.org/orkg/resource/>
PREFIX orkgc: <http://orkg.org/orkg/class/>
PREFIX orkgp: <http://orkg.org/orkg/predicate/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?paper ?paperLabel WHERE {
  ?paper orkgp:P31 ?contribution .
  ?contribution a orkgc:C27001 .
  ?contribution orkgp:P15124 ?da .
  {
    ?da orkgp:P56048 ?desc .
    ?desc orkgp:P57005 ?ct .
    ?ct orkgp:P47000 ?mean .
  }
  UNION
  {
    ?da orkgp:P56048 ?desc .
    ?desc orkgp:P57005 ?ct .
    ?ct orkgp:P57006 ?median .
  }
  OPTIONAL { ?paper rdfs:label ?paperLabel . }
}
ORDER BY ?paper
LIMIT 10

question: What is the minimum publication year among papers that report external validity threats?
gold_sparql:
PREFIX orkgr: <http://orkg.org/orkg/resource/>
PREFIX orkgc: <http://orkg.org/orkg/class/>
PREFIX orkgp: <http://orkg.org/orkg/predicate/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT (MIN(xsd:integer(?year)) AS ?min_year) WHERE {
  ?paper orkgp:P31 ?contribution .
  ?contribution a orkgc:C27001 .
  ?paper orkgp:P29 ?year .
  ?contribution orkgp:P39099 ?threats .
  ?threats orkgp:P55034 ?external_validity .
}

question: Which papers report an accuracy metric but do not report recall?
gold_sparql:
PREFIX orkgr: <http://orkg.org/orkg/resource/>
PREFIX orkgc: <http://orkg.org/orkg/class/>
PREFIX orkgp: <http://orkg.org/orkg/predicate/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?paper ?paperLabel WHERE {
  ?paper orkgp:P31 ?contribution .
  ?contribution a orkgc:C27001 .
  ?contribution orkgp:P15124 ?da .
  ?da orkgp:P57016 ?ml .
  ?ml orkgp:P2006 ?metric .
  ?metric rdfs:label ?metric_label .
  FILTER(REGEX(LCASE(STR(?metric_label)), "accuracy")) .
  FILTER NOT EXISTS {
    ?ml orkgp:P2006 ?metric2 .
    ?metric2 rdfs:label ?metric2_label .
    FILTER(REGEX(LCASE(STR(?metric2_label)), "recall"))
  }
  OPTIONAL { ?paper rdfs:label ?paperLabel . }
}
ORDER BY ?paper
LIMIT 10

question: Which papers published in venues whose name matches "requirements" report external validity threats?
gold_sparql:
PREFIX orkgr: <http://orkg.org/orkg/resource/>
PREFIX orkgc: <http://orkg.org/orkg/class/>
PREFIX orkgp: <http://orkg.org/orkg/predicate/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?paper ?paperLabel WHERE {
  ?paper orkgp:P31 ?contribution .
  ?contribution a orkgc:C27001 .
  ?contribution orkgp:P135046 ?venue .
  ?venue rdfs:label ?venue_name .
  FILTER(REGEX(LCASE(STR(?venue_name)), "requirements")) .
  ?contribution orkgp:P39099 ?threats .
  ?threats orkgp:P55034 ?external_validity .
  OPTIONAL { ?paper rdfs:label ?paperLabel . }
}
ORDER BY ?paper
LIMIT 10
